plugin.name: Solao_Who_Poller
plugin.author: Solao
plugin.purpose: Runs 'who' on a timer and eats the output, to keep Player Tracker fed

muclient.script:
local serialize = require "serialize"
local TITLE = "Who Poller" local PVER = GetPluginInfo(GetPluginID(), 19) or "?"
local function defaults () return { on = true, mins = 10, -- poll interval timeout = 8, -- seconds before the gag force-disarms afkvar = "AFKMode", -- skip the poll while this variable exists afkskip = true, quiet = true, -- no chatter when a poll fires polls = 0, } end local cfg = defaults()
local armed, pending_end = false, false
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- arm / disarm the gag ------------------------------------------------------------------ local function disarm () armed, pending_end = false, false EnableTrigger("whogag", false) DeleteTimer("whosafety") end
local function arm () armed, pending_end = true, false EnableTrigger("whogag", true) -- force-disarm if the reply never lands, so a dropped who can't eat the game AddTimer("whosafety", 0, 0, cfg.timeout, "", timer_flag.Enabled + timer_flag.OneShot + timer_flag.Replace + timer_flag.Temporary, "safety_fire") end
function safety_fire () if armed then disarm() ColourNote("orange","", TITLE..": who reply timed out, gag released.") end end
-- every line during the window comes here (and is already gagged by the trigger) function gag_line (line) if not armed then return end if pending_end then disarm(); return end -- eats the blank line after the footer if line:find("^Players invis") then pending_end = true end end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- the poll ------------------------------------------------------------------ local function afk_now () return cfg.afkskip and GetVariable(cfg.afkvar) ~= nil end
function do_poll () if not cfg.on then return end if afk_now() then return end -- flagged AFK: don't generate activity if armed then return end -- previous reply still coming arm() Send("who") cfg.polls = cfg.polls + 1 if not cfg.quiet then ColourNote("silver","", TITLE..": polled who (#"..cfg.polls..")") end end
local function schedule () DeleteTimer("whopoll") if not cfg.on then return end AddTimer("whopoll", 0, cfg.mins, 0, "", timer_flag.Enabled + timer_flag.Replace, "do_poll") end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- commands ------------------------------------------------------------------ local function trim (s) return (s or ""):gsub("^%s+",""):gsub("%s+$","") end
local function status () ColourNote("cyan","", TITLE.." v"..PVER) ColourNote("white","", " polling : "..(cfg.on and ("on, every "..cfg.mins.." min") or "off")) ColourNote("white","", " afk skip: "..(cfg.afkskip and ("on (skips while '"..cfg.afkvar.."' is set)") or "off")) ColourNote("white","", " polls : "..cfg.polls) ColourNote("white","", " gag : "..(armed and "armed" or "idle")) if afk_now() then ColourNote("orange","", " currently AFK -- polls are being skipped") end end
function wp_cmd (arg) arg = trim(arg or "") local verb, rest = arg:match("^(%S+)%s*(.*)$") verb = (verb or ""):lower()
if verb == "" or verb == "status" then status()
elseif verb == "on" then cfg.on = true; schedule(); SaveState() ColourNote("green","", TITLE..": on, every "..cfg.mins.." min.")
elseif verb == "off" then cfg.on = false; schedule(); disarm(); SaveState() ColourNote("green","", TITLE..": off.")
elseif verb == "now" then do_poll(); ColourNote("green","", TITLE..": polled.")
elseif verb == "afk" then local v = trim(rest):lower() if v == "on" or v == "off" then cfg.afkskip = (v == "on"); SaveState() ColourNote("green","", TITLE..": afk skip "..v..".") else ColourNote("orange","", "Usage: whopoll afk on|off") end
elseif tonumber(verb) then local m = math.floor(tonumber(verb)) if m < 1 or m > 120 then ColourNote("orange","", "Interval must be 1-120 minutes.") else cfg.mins = m; schedule(); SaveState() ColourNote("green","", TITLE..": every "..m.." min.") end
else ColourNote("cyan","", TITLE.." v"..PVER) for _, l in ipairs({ " whopoll - status", " whopoll on | off - start / stop polling", " whopoll <minutes> - set the interval (default 10)", " whopoll now - poll once, right now", " whopoll afk on|off - skip polls while you're flagged AFK (default on)", "Sends 'who' on a timer and eats the reply so it never hits your screen.", "Player Tracker still sees every line -- gagging hides output, it does not", "stop triggers.", }) do ColourNote("white","", l) end end end
------------------------------------------------------------------ -- lifecycle ------------------------------------------------------------------ function OnPluginInstall () cfg = defaults() local blob = GetVariable("cfg") if blob then local ok = pcall(function() assert(loadstring(blob))() end) if ok and saved then for k, v in pairs(saved) do cfg[k] = v end end end disarm() schedule() end
function SaveState () SetVariable("cfg", "saved = "..serialize.save_simple(cfg)) end function OnPluginSaveState () SaveState() end
function OnPluginClose () disarm() end function OnPluginDisable () disarm() end function OnPluginEnable () schedule() end
